subject: action learning project and enron tour

emails.subject: Re: Action Learning Project and Enron tour
emails.subject_base: Action Learning Project and Enron tour
emails.body: Re: Action Learning Project and Enron tour Christie, Let's meet to discuss this project. I need more information from you about it. By the way, I shall meet Bob Westbrook on Wednesday to discuss unrelated issues. Vince Christie Patrick 11/02/2000 12:33 AM

emails.subject: Re: Action Learning Project and Enron tour
emails.subject_base: Action Learning Project and Enron tour
emails.body: Hi Vince! I'll call you Monday to further discuss this! I'll be heading to Atlanta for a Forbes conference and meeting at Emory, but will call you at my first opportunity! Thanks for the information about the meeting with Bob! Thanks! --Christie. Forwarded by Christie Patrick/HOU/ECT on 11/04/2000 11:04 AM Vince J Kaminski 11/02/2000 01:55 PM
